TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sowal , o nano to'as a sowal no tamdaw, ato sapikilok to sowal a codad ato tilid. O sowal ko tanosok tamdaw a kakimadan palalicay. I tini i Pangcah a nipivuting, o sowal no Pangcah ko tanosok niyam a palalicay. Mido^do ko picodadan to rikec a pasadak to nananamen to sowal no kasasiroma^ no minco, malonananamen no micodaday a kasasiroma^ no minco, ato micoker to pisano kasasiroma^ no minco ko sowal a pipasifana'. Anomalahedaw ko sowal no tamdaw o incumincu hawi caay to ka calloway ko pipalowad toraray no serangawan, caay toka pakaratoh I teloc no tamdaw.
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ , o~u nano~u to~uʡas a so~uwaɾ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ato~u sapikiɾo~uk to~u so~uwaɾ a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ato~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. o~u so~uwaɾ ko~u tano~uso~uk tamɬ~ɮaw a kakimaɬ~ɮan paɾaɾiʦaj. i tini i paŋʦaħ a nipib~vo~u~utiŋ, o~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u tano~uso~uk nijam a paɾaɾiʦaj. miɬ~ɮo~uʔɬ~ɮo~u ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan to~u rikəʦ a pasaɬ~ɮak to~u nananamən to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kasasiro~umaʔ no~u minʦo~u, maɾo~unananamən no~u miʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj a kasasiro~umaʔ no~u minʦo~u, ato~u miʦo~ukər to~u pisano~u kasasiro~umaʔ no~u minʦo~u ko~u so~uwaɾ a pipasifanaʡ. ano~umaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u inʦo~u~uminʦo~u~u ħawi ʦaaj to~u ka ʦaɾɾo~uwaj ko~u pipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~uraraj no~u səraŋawan, ʦaaj to~uka pakarato~uħ i təɾo~uʦ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.FORM: Sowal , o nano to'as a sowal no tamdaw, ato sapikilok to sowal a codad ato tilid. O sowal ko tanosok tamdaw a kakimadan palalicay. I tini i Pangcah a nipivuting, o sowal no Pangcah ko tanosok niyam a palalicay. Mido^do ko picodadan to rikec a pasadak to nananamen to sowal no kasasiroma^ no minco, malonananamen no micodaday a kasasiroma^ no minco, ato micoker to pisano kasasiroma^ no minco ko sowal a pipasifana'. Anomalahedaw ko sowal no tamdaw o incumincu hawi caay to ka calloway ko pipalowad toraray no serangawan, caay toka pakaratoh I teloc no tamdaw.
S.PHON: so~uwaɾ , o~u nano~u to~uʡas a so~uwaɾ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ato~u sapikiɾo~uk to~u so~uwaɾ a ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ato~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. o~u so~uwaɾ ko~u tano~uso~uk tamɬ~ɮaw a kakimaɬ~ɮan paɾaɾiʦaj. i tini i paŋʦaħ a nipib~vo~u~utiŋ, o~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u tano~uso~uk nijam a paɾaɾiʦaj. miɬ~ɮo~uʔɬ~ɮo~u ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan to~u rikəʦ a pasaɬ~ɮak to~u nananamən to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kasasiro~umaʔ no~u minʦo~u, maɾo~unananamən no~u miʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj a kasasiro~umaʔ no~u minʦo~u, ato~u miʦo~ukər to~u pisano~u kasasiro~umaʔ no~u minʦo~u ko~u so~uwaɾ a pipasifanaʡ. ano~umaɾaħəɬ~ɮaw ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw o~u inʦo~u~uminʦo~u~u ħawi ʦaaj to~u ka ʦaɾɾo~uwaj ko~u pipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~uraraj no~u səraŋawan, ʦaaj to~uka pakarato~uħ i təɾo~uʦ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw.
